explore.description: This screen keeps the Expo examples, but uses NativeWind, i18n, and the same global palette.

explore.platformDescriptionSuffix: in the terminal running this project.

explore.imagesDescriptionSuffix: suffixes to provide files for different screen densities.
explore.themeDescription: This template uses NativeWind useColorScheme() to switch manually between system, light, and dark.
explore.i18nDescription: Texts come from local dictionaries in i18n/locales. You can add more languages without touching visual components.
